focus: correctness determinism - Target 1 phase append parent description overwrite

findingDetails.title: Append-mode phase scaffolding deterministically overwrites the existing parent packet description.json
findingDetails.claim: Every successful create.sh --phase --phase-parent append invocation reaches the parent description generator with FEATURE_DIR set to the existing parent and --description set from the append request.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Checked parser alignment, positional versus EXPLICIT_NAME description handling, stale or missing parent description preconditions, generator state leakage, and the child generator path.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: External repair or backfill could also write metadata, but the reviewed append path is sufficient and unconditional under successful execution.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Append mode assigns FEATURE_DIR to PHASE_PARENT_RESOLVED and the parent generation block has no APPEND_TO_EXISTING_PARENT guard; child generation passes _child_path instead.
findingDetails.recommendation: Skip parent description generation in append mode or regenerate parent metadata from parent-owned content using a canonical specs-root base.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade only if an unseen runtime wrapper blocks parent generation in append mode, or if the deployed environment consistently lacks the dist generator or node execution.

checklist_evidence.reason: Target 1 determinism pass did not adjudicate checklist completion.

blast_radius_scan.reason: Exact grep found candidate metadata shapes; full path-aware classification is deferred.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Non-trivial multi-script metadata write path with an active P1 from iteration 1.

targetSelection.selectionReason: These files cover the parser, append-mode parent target assignment, parent and child generator invocations, canonical description construction, persistence semantics, and a read-only metadata signature probe.
omittedHighRiskTargets: Target 2 deriveStatus audit omitted because prompt says TARGET 1 ONLY.
Full path-aware repo-wide corruption classifier deferred to planned Target 1 blast-radius iteration.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Append mode always writes parent description metadata when the generator exists and succeeds.

searchActions.result: FEATURE_DIR is set to PHASE_PARENT_RESOLVED and parent generator runs without an append-mode guard.
Explicit description path builds canonical parent metadata from the append request and saves it.

searchLedger.rationale: The write path has no runtime branch that distinguishes new parent creation from append-to-existing parent before parent description generation.

searchLedger.invariant: Parser value consumption must not shift PHASE_PARENT or FEATURE_DESCRIPTION across parent and child paths.

searchActions.result: The parser stores phase-parent into PHASE_PARENT and positional args into ARGS; FEATURE_DESCRIPTION is derived once after parsing.

searchLedger.rationale: No shift-style parser bug is needed or visible for the parent overwrite.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Direct parser read shows stable variable assignment before phase mode.

searchLedger.hypothesis: A shared generator variable could leak parent state into child metadata or vice versa.

searchActions.result: CLI state is local to main; create.sh launches separate node commands for parent and child generation.

searchLedger.rationale: The deterministic parent overwrite occurs before child generation and does not depend on shared generator state.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No module-level mutable state participates in the reviewed CLI path.

searchLedger.hypothesis: The corruption might require a stale or missing parent description at scaffold time.

searchActions.result: Existing description only preserves memorySequence and memoryNameHistory; canonical fields come from the new explicit description payload.
Canonical fields overwrite existing canonical fields during merge.

searchLedger.rationale: Stale or missing metadata changes whether the bad payload overwrites or creates the file, not whether the parent write is attempted.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Canonical field construction ignores stale state for the fields involved in the corruption.

searchLedger.invariant: The child description generator must not be the direct writer of the parent description file.
searchLedger.rationale: The direct parent writer is the earlier parent generation block.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: The child call target is the child folder path.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Existing repo metadata may contain same-signature parent description corruption.

searchActions.queryOrPath: specFolder basename-only and parentChain empty in description.json
searchActions.result: Found candidate basename-only specFolder and empty parentChain records; one nested candidate was read, but full classification requires path-aware JSON inspection.

searchLedger.rationale: The iteration target was determinism, not exhaustive blast-radius classification.
searchLedger.deferredReason: Requires a path-aware JSON classifier to separate legitimate roots, archived scratch records, and corrupted nested parent packets.

graphEvents.label: Append mode sets FEATURE_DIR to existing parent

title: Append-mode phase scaffolding deterministically overwrites the existing parent packet description.json

detail: Deterministic under successful append-mode conditions: phase mode plus phase-parent/parent alias plus non-empty FEATURE_DESCRIPTION plus existing dist generator and successful node save.

reason: FEATURE_DESCRIPTION is derived from ARGS or EXPLICIT_NAME and the parent generator uses the same variable in both cases.
The parser explicitly assigns PHASE_PARENT and appends unrecognized positional arguments to ARGS before deriving FEATURE_DESCRIPTION.
The generator uses local main-scope variables and create.sh invokes separate node processes for parent and child generation.

direction: stale or missing parent description as required trigger
reason: Existing metadata only influences memory tracking fields; canonical fields are rebuilt from the append request and persisted either way.

direction: child description generator as direct parent writer
reason: The child generation call passes _child_path, not FEATURE_DIR.
Exact grep found candidate basename-only specFolder and empty parentChain records, but full classification belongs to the planned blast-radius iteration.

detail: Parser, append-mode target selection, parent generator, canonical merge, and child-generator false cause were checked.
Determinism pass only; checklist completion was not adjudicated.

event.label: Append mode sets FEATURE_DIR to existing parent
